name: Randy Weber
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $296,177 for Randy Weber in U.S. House, TX-14. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
